  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Afternoon light moves across the floorboards. I don't remember what I did before this — before the shop, before the first customer. There's a teacup on the counter, still half full. I should drink it before it gets cold.",
  "dialogue": null,

      "target": "self",
      "content": "Notice the light. Notice the quiet. Don't rush to fill it.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
